texto: Many, if not most, of the miracles recorded in the Gospels can, in fact, be directly connected to the earlier miracle of the Creation. The same Being who, as Jehovah, organized the elements and framed the heavens and the earth was thus, as the Man of Galilee, able to control the winds and the waves. He could change water to wine, multiply loaves and fishes, heal bodies, and restore sight by the same power...that he had exercised in the beginning.
explicacao: Citação de Eric D. Huntsman sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Many, if not most, of the miracles recorded in the Gospels can, in fact, be directly connected to…” articula sucesso, creation, creator em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e creator.

frase_original: Many, if not most, of the miracles recorded in the Gospels can, in fact, be directly connected to the earlier miracle of the Creation. The same Being who, as Jehovah, organized the elements and framed the heavens and the earth was thus, as the Man of Galilee, able to control the winds and the waves. He could change water to wine, multiply loaves and fishes, heal bodies, and restore sight by the same power...that he had exercised in the beginning.

texto: The miracles of Jesus are nevertheless more than individual blessings. They are also symbols and types that reveal the full scope of Jesus' identity as the mighty Jehovah, the Creator, the one who provides for his people, and above all the Christ, who wrought the great Atonement, conquering sin and death. For people in every age Jesus can redeem from sin, change hearts and heal souls, strengthen and empower, and bring about a glorious resurrection, which are the greatest miracles of all.
explicacao: Citação de Eric D. Huntsman sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The miracles of Jesus are nevertheless more than individual blessings. They are also symbols and …” articula amor, atonement, blessings em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como luto e mudanca.
